name: fortress-nextjs
description: Fortress 95 Pro is a powerful Streamlit-based technical analysis dashboard designed for the Indian stock market (NSE). It provides traders and investors with institutional-grade insights by combining technical indicators, fundamental checks, sentiment analysis, and analyst consensus data into a unified scoring system.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n "next,fastapi" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix dashboard" "export PYTHONPATH=$PYTHONPATH:$(pwd)/engine:/Users/shivamdixit/Library/Python/3.9/lib/python/site-packages && python3 -m uvicorn main:app --port 8000 --app-dir engine --reload"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix dashboard && python3 -m pip install -r requirements.txt
